creator: cheiser@cais.net
text:
After install floppies boot.  I go partition a 334MB disk with 1 partition.
I label it with 330MB for / and 4MB swap.  (It's a flash drive)
I then goto select the distributions I want to install.  I goto custom
and right when I hit it it catches signal 11.  No additional output is
produced by turning debugging on.  The installation method choosen is FTP

Fix: 

I have no idea
How-To-Repeat: Just do the above and it'll happen every time!!!
